data.name: Dot-Grid Board System
data.summary: Implements a dot-grid board where dots define snake positions and bend paths. Board sizes range from a minimum of 3x3 to a maximum of 40x40 dots. Supports pinch-to-zoom gesture for larger boards using two fingers.
key_behaviors: Defines snake positions by dots on a grid
Allows bends in snake paths at dots

data.name: Gameplay Element Extensibility and First Encounter Popups
data.summary: System designed to support future elements like moving barriers and ice tiles. First encounter with any element triggers a popup with icon, description, and an OK button with pulse animation.
key_behaviors: Show new element popup on first encounter
Include icon, description, and animated OK button
